identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a realistic, immersive CyberRange AI platform that breaks generic SaaS tropes.
identity.tone: Serious, High-Tech, 'Hacker' aesthetic, Educational but immersive.

containers.dashboard_card: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-none relative overflow-hidden
containers.terminal_window: bg-[#0C0C0C] border border-white/20 font-mono rounded-sm shadow-2xl

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm font-rajdhani font-bold uppercase tracking-widest transition-all hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)] clip-path-polygon-[0_0,100%_0,100%_70%,90%_100%,0_100%]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-sm font-rajdhani uppercase tracking-widest

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border-white/20 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-none font-mono text-sm placeholder:text-white/30

hero_background.usage: Hero section background with heavy overlay

phishing_sim.usage: Phishing simulator intro or side panel

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure neon text on black background meets 4.5:1 ratio. Use lighter shades of neon for text.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable glitch effects and scanlines if prefers-reduced-motion is true.

instructions_to_main_agent: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the custom colors and fonts defined above.
Add the Google Fonts link to 'public/index.html' or import in CSS.
Create a 'Layout' component that includes the scanline overlay and navigation.
Use 'sonner' for all notifications (simulated attacks, success messages).
Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the main dashboard.
Ensure all inputs and interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
For the Phishing Simulator, use a split-view: Left side for configuration, Right side for the 'Email Preview'.
For the Ransomware Simulator, use a timeline visualization for the attack stages.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
